response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei in the first segment chatting (00:00-02:45). 2. Observed the start of a performance by Tokino Sora (02:46-end). 3. Identified the song 'Play' from on-screen Japanese text 'プレイ' along with credits '作詞:ケンモチヒデフミ' (Kenmochi Hidefumi) and '作曲:Giga' (Giga). 4. Searched for 'プレイ ケンモチヒデフミ Giga 歌詞' to retrieve the full lyrics. 5. Found the complete lyrics on multiple sources (UtaTen, UTA5). 6. Formatted the lyrics and mapped scenes to the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a conversation between VTubers Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei about a new outfit, followed by a vocal performance of the song "Play" (プレイ) by Tokino Sora.

scenes.description: VTubers Tokino Sora and Hoshimachi Suisei engage in an introductory conversation, discussing the debut of a new costume. No vocal music is playing.
Tokino Sora performs the song 'Play'. On-screen text credits the lyrics to Kenmochi Hidefumi and music to Giga. The performance features dynamic lighting and visual effects.
